title: A Polite Interruption
learningGoal: The learner will verbally construct sentences using the Te-form to request someone to wait and to describe what they are currently doing.
instructions: In this roleplay, someone is rushing you. Verbally tell them to wait, explain what you are currently doing, and then make a polite request of your own.

contentItems.text: Remember the double 't' in 'Matte'. Pronounce it with a slight pause.

speakingPrompt: Translate: 1) Please wait a little. 2) I am studying Japanese now. 3) Please read this book.
scenario: A friend is trying to get you to leave, but you are busy studying.

subTasks.prompt: Your friend says 'Let's go!'. Tell them: 'Please wait a little.'

sampleResponse.targetText: ちょっと まって ください。

subTasks.prompt: Explain what you are doing. Say: 'I am studying Japanese now.'

sampleResponse.targetText: いま にほんごを べんきょうして います。
sampleResponse.transliteration: Ima nihongo wo benkyou shite imasu.

subTasks.prompt: Hand them a book to keep them busy. Say: 'Please read this book.'

sampleResponse.targetText: この ほんを よんで ください。

scenarioContext.targetText: はやく いきましょう！

baselineTranscriptSentences.targetText: ちょっと まって ください。
いま にほんごを べんきょうして います。
baselineTranscriptSentences.transliteration: Ima nihongo wo benkyou shite imasu.

baselineTranscriptSentences.targetText: この ほんを よんで ください。

expectedSpeakingPoints: Say Ima nihongo wo benkyou shite imasu
Say Kono hon wo yonde kudasai
acceptableParaphrases: Using 'Sore' or 'Are' instead of 'Kono' is acceptable if pointing.

criteria.name: Te-form Conjugation Accuracy
criteria.description: Did the learner correctly conjugate Machimasu to Matte, Shimasu to Shite, and Yomimasu to Yonde?

criteria.name: Requests vs Progressive
criteria.description: Did the learner correctly attach 'kudasai' for requests and 'imasu' for the ongoing action?

adminCorrectAnswerSet.sampleAnswer: ちょっと まって ください。いま にほんごを べんきょうして います。この ほんを よんで ください。

feedbackRules.onPass: Fantastic speaking! You fluidly switched between making requests and describing your actions.
feedbackRules.onFail: Make sure you used 'Yonde' for reading. The verb is 'Yomimasu', which becomes 'Yonde'.
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good effort! Remember the double consonant in 'Matte'. It should have a tiny pause in the middle.

audioAssets.audioTranscript: はやく いきましょう！ちょっと まって ください。いま にほんごを べんきょうして います。この ほんを よんで ください。

hintText: Match the ending to the intent: 'kudasai' = please do this. 'imasu' = I am doing this.
